title: Citation styles
text: uomthesis ships five CSL (Citation Style Language) files cover common citation styles used AMBS research. View list_csl(): style identified short name used create_thesis() copy_csl(). sha256 column records hash CSL file retrieval time reproducibility can verified: upstream file changes, hash differ. bundled styles : Policy section 7.2 requires citations consistent, recognised style throughout thesis. five bundled styles satisfies requirement.
code: library(uomthesis) list_csl() #>                  name #> 1  harvard-manchester #> 2                 apa #> 3 chicago-author-date #> 4                mhra #> 5           vancouver #>                                                                                                   url #> 1 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/harvard-cite-them-right.csl #> 2                     https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa.csl #> 3     https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/chicago-author-date.csl #> 4              https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/mhra-notes.csl #> 5      https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/elsevier-vancouver.csl #>    retrieved                                                           sha256 #> 1 2026-06-02 0ca3d2c7c881cd98cdd81098b5349f5921edf430498aa9a5a41918621cf7cc45 #> 2 2026-06-02 1ece4fb3c295e66d04b4394e295aa58a87741ceeef1658192437eb9953c2f13e #> 3 2026-06-02 002fade78d7e4fe9d42936a16b43a8066b097013f6255df40b1bfba6631eff9b #> 4 2026-06-02 9fa37e7faabf28795309b74b42c459b9586fd8f58529ed2db9f40722db3a7637 #> 5 2026-06-02 005e915c3419eb2b84eb2b31bffc411dce3890619d3fd0ed23ac6591ac128335

title: Citation styles
text: Pass reference_style create_thesis(): scaffolder copies apa.csl extension’s csl/ subdirectory sets csl: _extensions/uomthesis-standard/csl/apa.csl _quarto.yml. reference_style omitted default harvard-manchester.
code: create_thesis(   "my-thesis",   degree          = "PhD",   author          = list(forename = "Jane", surname = "Doe"),   title           = "An analysis of something",   year            = 2027,   division        = "MSM",   reference_style = "apa" )

title: Citation styles
text: change citation style existing project: Step 1. Copy new CSL extension directory: Step 2. Update csl: line _quarto.yml: Step 3. Re-render: journal-format project, replace uomthesis-standard uomthesis-journal path.
code: copy_csl("apa", to = "_extensions/uomthesis-standard/csl/") bibliography: references.bib csl: _extensions/uomthesis-standard/csl/apa.csl quarto::quarto_render()

title: Citation styles
text: restricted five bundled styles. supervisor requires specific style, target journal custom CSL: Download CSL file (e.g., https://citationstyles.org/ CSL repository https://github.com/citation-style-language/styles). Save anywhere inside project (e.g., _extensions/uomthesis-standard/csl/-style.csl). Point csl: _quarto.yml file path: csl-bundled--path-exists validator rule accepts path resolves existing file, custom CSL pass validation long present disk.

title: Citation styles
text: file inst/csl/SOURCES.yml records provenance bundled CSL: new version package built, dev/sync_shared.R re-downloads file, verifies sha256, updates SOURCES.yml upstream file changed. means can always tell exactly version CSL style thesis used reproduce hash. list_csl() function surfaces information directly:
code: - name: harvard-manchester   url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/.../harvard-cite-them-right.csl   retrieved: '2026-06-02'   sha256: 0ca3d2c7... # View provenance of all bundled styles list_csl()[, c("name", "retrieved", "sha256")]

title: Compliance validation
text: check_thesis() runs registry source-phase validation rules Quarto thesis project. rule maps one sections Presentation Theses Policy (v12, March 2026). finding either error (thesis likely rejected unless fixed) warning (investigated; may intentional). Source-phase rules inspect .qmd files, _quarto.yml, extension partials. planned PDF-phase rule set (v0.2) additionally inspect rendered document. Run validator within thesis project directory:

title: Compliance validation
text: table lists 19 rules registry order.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 8 / general submission requirements Severity: error Formats: Checks required uomthesis: YAML fields present non-empty index.qmd: degree, author (forename surname), title, year, division, faculty, school, thesis_format. fix: Open index.qmd ensure every field uomthesis: block non-empty value. Use validate_metadata() focused check just metadata block.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: general submission Severity: error Formats: Checks degree, faculty, school belong allowed sets. Supported degrees: PhD, MPhil, MD, EdD, DBA, EngD. Supported faculty: Humanities. Supported school: Alliance Manchester Business School. fix: Verify values uomthesis: block allowed sets. degree listed, open GitHub issue – registry updated Doctoral Academy recognises new degree types.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: general submission Severity: error Formats: Checks year plausible four-digit integer (2000–2100) month name non-year string. fix: Set year numeric year 2027, string like "March 2027".

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 13 Severity: error Formats: Checks thesis_format either "standard" "journal". fix: Set thesis_format standard journal uomthesis: block.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 7.1 Severity: error Formats: Checks mainfont one policy-permitted typefaces. Run policy_info() see current permitted list. fix: Choose permitted font. TeX Gyre Termes (Times New Roman equivalent) recommended default available standard LaTeX distributions.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 7.1 Severity: error Formats: Checks chosen mainfont compatible configured PDF engine. OpenType fonts require LuaLaTeX XeLaTeX used pdflatex. fix: Either switch LuaLaTeX (recommended) setting pdf-engine: lualatex _quarto.yml, choose font pdflatex-safe.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 7.1 Severity: error Formats: Checks linestretch 1.5 2.0 (values policy permits main text). field may absent (extension default 1.5 used). fix: Set linestretch 1.5 2.0.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 9.1.d Severity: warning Formats: ai_disclosure.include true, checks ai_disclosure.tools non-empty list tool names. declaration without tools list malformed. fix: Either set ai_disclosure.include: false (use AI tools) populate ai_disclosure.tools names tool used (e.g., [ChatGPT-4o, GitHub Copilot]).

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 6.1 Severity: warning Formats: lang key set _quarto.yml index.qmd, checks starts en. Policy section 6.1 requires thesis written UK English unless advance written approval obtained another language. fix: warning incorrect (approval another language), suppress rule passing rules = setdiff(uomthesis:::rule_ids(), "english-language") check_thesis(). Otherwise set lang: en-GB.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 8.1.b Severity: error Formats: Checks title page partial (_extensions/uomthesis-*/partials/title-page.tex) contains policy-mandated submission statement. Run policy_info() see required text. fix: edit title-page partial directly unless know . accidentally altered , re-copy package: uomthesis:::install_partial("title-page.tex", format = "standard").

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 8.1.f Severity: error Formats: Checks declaration partial (_extensions/uomthesis-*/partials/declaration.tex) contains one two policy-mandated declaration texts verbatim. Run policy_info() see variants. fix: paraphrase declaration. Restore package partial altered.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 8.1.g Severity: error Formats: Checks copyright partial contains four mandatory bullet points policy section 8.1.g requires. Run policy_info() see required text. fix: Restore copyright partial package template. remove alter mandatory bullets.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 8.1.g Severity: error Formats: Checks author name copyright partial matches author metadata index.qmd. mismatch typically means copyright partial copied another candidate’s project without updated. fix: Search copyright partial previous author’s name replace name, re-run create_thesis() fresh directory.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 8.1 Severity: error Formats: Checks preliminary pages appear order mandated policy section 8.1 (title, abstract, declaration, copyright, dedication/acknowledgements present, body chapters, appendices). fix: Reorder chapters: list _quarto.yml preliminary files appear body files. validator reports first --order file finds.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 8.1.e Severity: warning Formats: Checks (heuristically) whether abstract index.qmd exceeds approximately one page text. source-phase check counts words; PDF-phase check (v0.2) verify rendered page count. fix: Shorten abstract ~300–350 words. policy mandates one page maximum.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 7.2 Severity: error Formats: Checks csl: value _quarto.yml either bundled style name (resolvable via list_csl()) path file exists disk. fix: Use one bundled style names (run list_csl()$name see ), provide valid path CSL file. See vignette("citation-styles").

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 7.2 Severity: error Formats: Checks every file listed bibliography: _quarto.yml exists disk. fix: Create missing .bib file, remove bibliography: list _quarto.yml.

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 13.10 Severity: error Formats: journal Checks chapter file whose name contains rationale (case-insensitive) listed _quarto.yml book.chapters. fix: Add rationale chapter (e.g., chapters/00-rationale.qmd) list _quarto.yml. See vignette("journal-format").

title: Compliance validation
text: Policy section: 13.3 Severity: warning Formats: journal Checks chapter file whose name contains paper (case-insensitive) carries contribution attribute top-level heading. fix: Add {contribution="..."} # heading paper chapter. See vignette("journal-format") expected format.

title: Compliance validation
text: check_thesis() supports three output formats via format argument:

title: Compliance validation
text: Findings printed console using cli styling. Errors highlighted red, warnings yellow. summary line reports total counts.

title: Compliance validation
text: Findings written check-report.md project root. file overwritten run. Useful committing compliance snapshot version control.

title: Compliance validation
text: Returns JSON string (invisibly) also prints . finding JSON object fields: rule_id, severity, message, location, policy_ref, hint. Useful CI integration.
code: result <- check_thesis(".", format = "json") # result is a JSON string

title: Compliance validation
text: fail_on argument controls check_thesis() signals R error (allowing use CI pipelines):
code: # Stop the build if any errors are found: check_thesis(".", fail_on = "error")  # Stop the build if any warnings or errors are found: check_thesis(".", fail_on = "warning")

title: Compliance validation
text: Pass character vector rule IDs rules run subset: get full list rule IDs programmatically:

title: Getting started with uomthesis
text: uomthesis gives PhD students Alliance Manchester Business School (AMBS), Faculty Humanities, University Manchester, Quarto-based writing environment policy-compliant day one. scaffolds complete project – two rendering formats (standard journal), required preliminary pages, correct margins fonts – provides word counter compliance validator can catch problems early rather submission.

title: Getting started with uomthesis
text: also need: Quarto >= 1.5 (download https://quarto.org/) LuaLaTeX – recommended PDF engine. easiest way get via TinyTeX:
code: remotes::install_github("gabriel-cabrera-guz/uomthesis") quarto::quarto_add_extension("quarto install tinytex") # or from R: # tinytex::install_tinytex()

title: Getting started with uomthesis
text: create_thesis() writes ready--render project new directory. function creates -thesis/ directory prints summary written.
code: library(uomthesis)  create_thesis(   "my-thesis",   degree         = "PhD",   author         = list(forename       = "Jane",                         middle_initial = "Q",                         surname        = "Doe"),   title          = "An analysis of something important",   year           = 2027,   division       = "MSM",   format         = "standard",    # or "journal"   reference_style = "harvard-manchester" )

title: Getting started with uomthesis
text: running create_thesis(), project contains: journal-format project extension directory _extensions/uomthesis-journal/ additional chapters/00-rationale.qmd.

title: Getting started with uomthesis
text: Edit index.qmd fill abstract. uomthesis: YAML block top index.qmd holds thesis metadata: Add chapters creating new .qmd files chapters/ listing _quarto.yml book.chapters. Place BibTeX entries references.bib cite [@key] syntax.
code: uomthesis:   degree: PhD   author:     forename: Jane     middle_initial: Q     surname: Doe   title: "An analysis of something important"   year: 2027   division: MSM   faculty: Humanities   school: "Alliance Manchester Business School"   thesis_format: standard   mainfont: "TeX Gyre Termes"   linestretch: 1.5

title: Getting started with uomthesis
text: R, terminal inside project directory: produces PDF (via LuaLaTeX) HTML version. written _book/ directory. Open _book/index.html browser preview HTML, _book/-thesis.pdf view PDF.

title: Getting started with uomthesis
text: word_count() counts main-text words according policy definition (section 4.6 fn. 1: preliminary pages, bibliography, appendices, footnotes excluded) reports count applicable cap.
code: word_count()          # run from within the project directory

title: Getting started with uomthesis
text: check_thesis() runs full source-phase rule registry reports findings: finding either error (must fix submission) warning (investigate). Run check_thesis() regularly write, just end.
code: check_thesis()                              # console output (default) check_thesis(".", format = "markdown")     # writes check-report.md check_thesis(".", format = "json")         # returns a JSON string

title: Getting started with uomthesis
text: vignette("journal-format") – writing journal-format thesis, read start. vignette("compliance") – full list 19 rules, checks, fix findings. vignette("citation-styles") – choose, switch, bring citation style.

title: Journal-format theses
text: Policy section 13 permits PhD candidates submit thesis collection papers rather conventional monograph. Journal Format Theses Guiding Principles (University Manchester) apply. Key points: thesis must still coherent, unified piece work overarching argument. minimum maximum number papers, overall word count cap 90,000 words PhD journal-format thesis (versus 80,000 standard format). Papers may published, submitted, preparation. Published submitted papers need reformatted match body font, must incorporated chapters. paper chapter must carry explicit statement candidate’s contribution (policy section 13.3). dedicated rationale chapter mandatory (policy section 13.10). Approval use journal format must obtained School thesis submitted. Contact Doctoral Academy approval form.

title: Journal-format theses
text: Pass format = "journal" create_thesis(): scaffolded project includes: chapters/00-rationale.qmd – mandatory rationale chapter (pre-populated section headings). chapters/01-paper-one.qmd, chapters/02-paper-two.qmd – starter paper chapters contribution declaration attributes. _extensions/uomthesis-journal/ – journal-format Quarto extension.
code: library(uomthesis)  create_thesis(   "my-journal-thesis",   degree  = "PhD",   author  = list(forename       = "Jane",                  middle_initial = "Q",                  surname        = "Doe"),   title   = "Three papers on important things",   year    = 2027,   division = "MSM",   format  = "journal" )

title: Journal-format theses
text: Policy section 13.10 mandates rationale chapter : Explains journal format appropriate thesis. Describes papers relate overarching argument. States role paper thesis structure. scaffolded 00-rationale.qmd contains placeholder headings points. Fill write anything else – anchor writing throughout. validator rule journal-rationale-present checks file whose name contains rationale (case-insensitive) exists among book chapters. rename file, update _quarto.yml accordingly.

title: Journal-format theses
text: Policy section 13.3 requires paper chapter contains explicit statement candidate’s individual contribution. uomthesis, journal extension reads contribution attribute chapter’s top-level heading. .qmd file, add attribute # heading: extension renders formatted contribution box start chapter. text specific: name co-author, describe role, state clearly candidate independently. validator rule journal-contribution-stmts checks presence contribution attribute (equivalent YAML key) file whose name contains paper (case-insensitive). file missing attribute reported warning.
code: # Paper title {contribution="Lead author. Conceived and conducted all analyses, wrote the first draft. Co-author X provided comments on three manuscript revisions."}

title: Journal-format theses
text: PhD journal-format thesis cap 90,000 words main text. exclusions apply standard format (preliminary pages, bibliography, appendices, footnotes). word_count() reads thesis format uomthesis: YAML block applies correct cap automatically.
code: # Run from within the thesis project: word_count()

title: Journal-format theses
text: uomthesis.thesis_format set "journal", check_thesis() runs two additional rules: rules skipped entirely standard-format theses. Run validator : want run journal-specific rules: See vignette("compliance") complete rule list output format options.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Gabriel Cabrera. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Cabrera G (2026). uomthesis: University Manchester AMBS PhD Thesis Template Compliance Tools. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/gabbocg/uomthesis.
code: @Manual{,   title = {uomthesis: University of Manchester AMBS PhD Thesis Template and Compliance Tools},   author = {Gabriel Cabrera},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/gabbocg/uomthesis}, }

title: uomthesis
text: Author: Gabriel CabreraLicense: MIT + file LICENSE

title: uomthesis
text: uomthesis R package writing University Manchester AMBS PhD thesis Quarto. create_thesis() scaffolds policy-compliant book project (standard monograph journal-format 1–10 papers). check_thesis() runs 18 source-phase rules project; word_count() checks main text policy cap. Five citation styles ship bundled (Harvard-Manchester, APA, Chicago author-date, MHRA, Vancouver).

title: uomthesis
text: also need: Quarto (>= 1.5) LaTeX engine – LuaLaTeX recommended. don’t one, install TinyTeX via quarto install tinytex.
code: # Install from GitHub (not yet on CRAN) # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("gabbocg/uomthesis")

title: uomthesis
code: library(uomthesis)  # Scaffold a journal-format PhD thesis with 3 constituent papers create_thesis(   path     = "my-thesis",   format   = "journal",   degree   = "PhD",   division = "A&F",   author   = list(forename = "Gabriel", surname = "Cabrera"),   title    = "Three essays on something interesting",   year     = 2026 )  # In the new project, render with Quarto setwd("my-thesis") quarto::quarto_render()  # Then check compliance whenever you like check_thesis(".") #> ── uomthesis::check_thesis() - journal ───────────────────────────────────────── #> ✔ 18 rules passed #> ✖ 0 errors #> ! 0 warnings

title: uomthesis
text: num_papers (1–10) controls many constituent paper chapters journal-format skeleton scaffolds. Paper 1 rich demo chapter exercises citations, equations, tables, figures, per-paper appendices; Papers 2..N bare structural templates.
code: # Monograph (standard) thesis create_thesis("monograph-thesis", format = "standard", ...)  # Two-paper DBA, no list of publications yet create_thesis(   path                 = "dba-thesis",   format               = "journal",   degree               = "DBA",   num_papers           = 2L,   list_of_publications = FALSE,   ... )  # Five-paper PhD using APA citation style and xelatex create_thesis(   path            = "five-paper-thesis",   format          = "journal",   num_papers      = 5L,   reference_style = "apa",   engine          = "xelatex",   ... )

title: uomthesis
text: count excludes preliminaries, references, appendices per policy section 4.6 fn. 1. cap degree × format-specific (PhD standard: 80,000; PhD journal: 80,000; MPhil: 60,000; DBA: 60,000; etc.).
code: word_count(".") #> Main-text word count #> ---------------------------------------- #>  Count             68,432 #>  Cap (PhD)         80,000 #>  Status            within cap

title: uomthesis
text: check_thesis() runs registry 18 source-phase rules covering: required preliminary pages order (section 8.1), declaration text variant (8.1.f), copyright statement – four mandatory bullets (8.1.g), font / line spacing / LaTeX engine compatibility (7.1), word caps per degree × format (4.6, 13.11), citation style bibliography presence (7.2), journal-format-specific rules including rationale chapter (13.10) contribution declarations (13.3).
code: check_thesis(".", format = "console") #> ── uomthesis::check_thesis() - journal ───────────────────────────────────────── #> ✔ 18 rules passed #> ✖ 0 errors #> ! 0 warnings  # JSON output for CI pipelines check_thesis(".", format = "json")

title: uomthesis
code: policy_info() #> uomthesis is built against the University of Manchester #> Presentation of Theses Policy v12 (March 2026). #> Next policy review: November 2028.

what: Scaffold a new uomthesis project — create_thesis
title: Scaffold a new uomthesis project — create_thesis
text: Creates directory tree containing Quarto project (_quarto.yml, index.qmd, chapter stubs), copies appropriate Quarto extension (standard journal) chosen CSL file project's _extensions/ directory, substitutes user-supplied metadata scaffolded index.qmd.

title: Scaffold a new uomthesis project — create_thesis
code: create_thesis(   path,   format = c("standard", "journal"),   degree = "PhD",   faculty = "Humanities",   school = "Alliance Manchester Business School",   division = NULL,   author = NULL,   title = NULL,   year = NULL,   reference_style = c("harvard-manchester", "apa", "chicago-author-date", "mhra",     "vancouver"),   engine = c("lualatex", "xelatex", "pdflatex"),   mainfont = "Times New Roman",   list_of_publications = NULL,   num_papers = 3L,   force = FALSE,   open = rlang::is_interactive() )

title: Scaffold a new uomthesis project — create_thesis
text: path Path new project directory. format "standard" "journal". degree One degrees policy allowed set. faculty Faculty name. Default: "Humanities". school School name. Default: "Alliance Manchester Business School". division AMBS division code: "&F" | "IMP" | "MSM" | "PMO", NULL. author Named list components forename, middle_initial, surname, native_name (optional). NULL, placeholders used. title Thesis title. NULL, placeholder used. year Year submission (integer). Defaults current year. reference_style One list_csl()$name. engine "lualatex" | "xelatex" | "pdflatex". mainfont One policy-allowed fonts. list_of_publications journal format: TRUE (default journal), chapters/00-publications.qmd page scaffolded listed _quarto.yml. Set FALSE papers list yet – page omitted directory book chapters. effect format = "standard". num_papers journal format: integer 1-10, number constituent paper chapters scaffold (Introduction + N papers + Conclusion). Default 3 (typical AMBS journal-format thesis size per policy section 13.5). Paper 1 always rich example chapter demonstrates citations, equations, tables, figures, per-paper appendices; Papers 2..N bare structural templates letter- prefixed appendix headings (N., N.B). effect format = "standard". force TRUE, allow path exist long empty. open TRUE RStudio available, open new project.

title: Scaffold a new uomthesis project — create_thesis
text: Invisible path created project.

what: uomthesis: University of Manchester AMBS PhD Thesis Template and Compliance Tools — uomthesis-package
title: uomthesis: University of Manchester AMBS PhD Thesis Template and Compliance Tools — uomthesis-package
text: Provides Quarto template (standard journal formats), project scaffolder, word counter, compliance validator PhD theses submitted Alliance Manchester Business School (AMBS) Faculty Humanities University Manchester. Encodes requirements University's Presentation Theses Policy.

title: uomthesis: University of Manchester AMBS PhD Thesis Template and Compliance Tools — uomthesis-package
text: Maintainer: Gabriel Cabrera gabriel.cabrera.guz@gmail.com

what: Count main-text words in a uomthesis project — word_count
title: Count main-text words in a uomthesis project — word_count
text: Counts words per Presentation Theses Policy section 4.6 fn.1 definition "main text" (core chapters + footnotes/endnotes; excludes preliminary pages, bibliography, appendices).

title: Count main-text words in a uomthesis project — word_count
code: word_count(project = ".", rendered_pdf = NULL, warn_at = 0.9, error_at = NULL)

title: Count main-text words in a uomthesis project — word_count
text: project Path project root (containing _quarto.yml). rendered_pdf Optional path rendered PDF. yet implemented v0.1 – supplying value emits warning falls back source-based counting. honored v0.2. warn_at Fraction cap warning printed (default 0.9). error_at Optional fraction cap error raised. Must greater warn_at supplied.

title: uomthesis 0.1.0
text: First tagged release.

title: uomthesis 0.1.0
text: create_thesis() – scaffold new Quarto project PhD thesis Alliance Manchester Business School. Supports standard journal formats. word_count() – count main-text words applicable policy cap, per policy section 4.6 fn. 1. check_thesis() – run source-phase compliance validator. Source-phase rules cover required metadata, title-page statement, declaration text, copyright statement, font/engine/spacing, prelim order, bibliography existence, journal-format-specific rules. Console, markdown, JSON output formats supported. validate_metadata() – lint uomthesis: YAML block without running full check. policy_info() – report targeted Presentation Theses Policy version. list_csl() / copy_csl() – list copy bundled citation styles (Harvard, APA, Chicago author-date, MHRA, Vancouver). Quarto extensions uomthesis-standard uomthesis-journal packaged R package – produce compliant PDF (LuaLaTeX) plus companion HTML.

title: uomthesis 0.1.0
text: build encodes Presentation Theses Policy v12 (March 2026). Next policy review: November 2028. Run policy_info() confirm.

title: uomthesis 0.1.0
text: PDF-phase validator rules (planned 0.2). Word (.docx) output (scope). Practice-based theses (scope; School-specific).

title: uomthesis 0.1.0
text: Built Presentation Theses Policy Journal Format Theses Guiding Principles University Manchester. Source: https://documents.manchester.ac.uk/display.aspx?DocID=7420.
